description_long: This is a round, low-profile table with a smooth, wooden top and a sturdy, dark-colored base. The tabletop is circular and appears to be made from a single piece of wood, giving it a seamless and elegant appearance. The base consists of four angled legs that converge at a central support, providing stability and a modern aesthetic. The legs are likely made of metal or painted wood, contrasting with the warm tone of the tabletop. There are no visible drawers, handles, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design. This table would be suitable for use in public parks, urban plazas, or outdoor seating areas.
description: A round, low wooden table with a smooth top and four angled dark legs, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular tabletop and the four angled legs beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the round tabletop and the central convergence of the legs, with less tabletop surface visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the tabletop and leg arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the tabletop and leg structure visible from a different angle.
attribute_number_of_legs: four angled legs converging at a central support
